generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I'm deeply concerned about our national security. The recent push for 'strategic autonomy' sounds good on paper, but have we really thought this through? Our allies have been reliable partners for decades. Why risk weakening those bonds when we face so many uncertainties? Let's not gamble with our safety just to make a political point. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouLeap
